title: Workshop reminder
subject: Reminder for your upcoming Big Bend Burro workshop
body:
Hi {{guestName}},

This is your reminder for {{contextLabel}} on {{dateLabel}}.

Please bring any items listed in the workshop notes and plan to arrive a little early so we can get everyone settled before we begin.

If your plans change, reply before the session so we can adjust the local roster.

Chuck, Susan, and Burro
